audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 271-273 directly enforce the invariant: `if (!isAssetOutPriceValid) { eligibleAssetsIdx = 0; }` runs unconditionally after the loop with no bypass. `isAssetOutPriceValid` defaults to `false` and is only set to `true` when `_getAssetPrice(s_assetOut, false)` returns a non-zero, non-stale price; if assetOut is absent or unconfigured, it remains `false` and clears all eligible assets conservatively. The subsequent assembly block (lines 274-278) also zeroes the in-memory array length, so the ABI-encoded payload passed to `performUpkeep` carries an empty eligible-assets array.
